data.title: Translational Diligence: tau / Alzheimer's Disease
data.executive_summary: High biological rationale with significant clinical translation risk.
data.conclusion: Tau remains biologically central in AD, but clinical validation for anti-tau modalities is unproven with notable program failures.
data.top_risk: Mixed Phase 2/3 outcomes for anti-tau modalities

sections.heading: Target biology
sections.body: High biological rationale with significant clinical translation risk.

sections.body: Tau remains biologically central in AD, but clinical validation for anti-tau modalities is unproven with notable program failures.
